pattern: Apply gravity row by row before rotating, settling each stone against the nearest obstacle or floor, then transpose-and-flip the grid to produce the clockwise rotation.
hints: Resolve gravity in the original orientation first: within each row a stone slides toward the right end (which becomes the bottom after rotation).
Obstacles split a row into independent segments; in each segment all stones pack against the segment's right boundary.
After settling stones per row, rotate the whole grid 90 degrees clockwise (the cell at row r, column c moves to row c, column rows-1-r).

edge_inputs.description: single row, one stone falls to bottom
obstacle blocks part of the row

stress.description: random side-view box with stones, obstacles and empties
stress.note: stones are re-settled by the solution so any starting layout is valid input
